name: Space Bubbles Must Die!
short_description: Space Bubbles Must Die! is a tiny, highly-addictive bubble-shooter where you eliminate evil space bubbles to save the planet. Inspired by the classic titles like Peggle, Arkanoid and Space Invaders.
detailed_description:
Space Bubbles Must Die! is a tiny, highly-addictive bubble-shooter Inspired by the classic titles like Peggle, Arkanoid and Space Invaders.



GAMEPLAY:
Destroy all Space bubbles and save the World!
Don't let the Bubbles cross the bottom line, or the game will end!

CONTROLS:

AIM - Use Left & Right arrow  or hold down the Left mouse button.
SHOOT - Press SPACE or release the Left mouse button.

FEATURES:

  • A excellent Family friendly coffee-break game!

  • Addictive and Simple gameplay

  • Infinite replayability as you chase ever higher scores!

  • 70 levels full of bubbles

  • Unlockable Color Themes and many special Bonuses

  • A lot of traps to avoid

  • Handcrafted pixel graphics created with love

  • Great music by Kevin MacLeod

  • Xbox 360 controller support

  • And Steam Achievements

Warning: This game contains a lot of Bubbles! :O
